title: Rate Limit Waiting
description: Heartbeat emitted every ~60s during a long-wait rate-limit sleep so UIs can show live progress.

state.description: State name currently waiting on rate-limit recovery

elapsed_seconds.description: Wall-clock seconds elapsed in the current tier's sleep

next_attempt_at.description: Unix timestamp when this sleep is scheduled to end

total_waited_seconds.description: Accumulated wall-clock seconds across all rate-limit waits for this state
